message:
fix(db): converge ATC schema init paths (br-bn0vb.2)

Force eager file-backed ATC test init, apply canonical ATC follow-up in rollup test bootstrap, and replay the ATC runtime follow-up after reconstruction so insert_experience and reconstruct probes pass consistently.

Verified with rch exec targeted tests:
- queries::tests::fetch_durable_atc_experience_by_id_migrates_legacy_feature_payloads
- queries::tests::reprocess_atc_feature_schema_rewrites_legacy_rows
- atc_queries::tests::refresh_rollups_* (5 tests)
- reconstruct::tests::reconstruct_with_agent_profile

Broader cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core -p mcp-agent-mail-db is currently blocked by unrelated asupersync compile errors in runtime/reactor/io_uring.rs on the worker.
